roles: VP of Marketing, Faith Driven Entrepreneur
Chief Strategist, Social Media + Innovation, Dunham+Company
Former Social Media / Innovation Pastor, Community Bible Church (San Antonio)

build.depth: standard (channel-saturating on the in-window YouTube corpus)
filters_applied: exclude videos < 3 min (shorts) — none in window were shorter than 6 min

coverage_gaps: s016 'Bringing Technology to El Salvador with Compassion Causes' (2024-12-03) — NO captions available; not transcribed (whisper not installed). Registered as a source but yields 0 EP. Low impact (mission-trip narrative, not methodology).

Books (Social Media Guide for Ministry, The Social Media Guide, Crypto for Good) — registered but NOT harvested: no user-supplied legal copy; published pre-window. Only public framing is reflected via the YouTube corpus. Provide an owned EPUB/PDF to add them.
Training/community (nilssmith.com/grow, socialmedia.church) and the Faith Driven Entrepreneur podcast appearance — not separately harvested; their substance overlaps the YouTube corpus.
Personal-brand-vs-org-account stance leans on a single in-window source (s004); the older 'Should Pastors Have a Personal Brand' video is pre-cutoff. Treat as M-confidence.
Deep crypto/web3 thesis is thin in-window (2 EP). Pre-2024 NFT/crypto videos are out of scope.
faithfulness_smoke: 5 match / 1 partial / 0 contradiction over 6 held-out probes (runs/0001/faithfulness.md). Indicative only.
notes: Auto-caption transcripts render 'Nils' as 'Neil'/'Niles' — quotes were name-corrected on extraction. DB built on local disk then copied to the project (SQLite write-locking fails on the WSL network share; reads are fine, so CHAT works in place).
